title: Compressed Air Blower/portable Turbo Fan, 160000rpm compressed Air Injector, Plumeau compressed Air Dust Collector with 10000 mAh Battery, Air Duster used for cleaning PC Household Cars
features: High quality: This compressed air blower adopts imported high-quality high-speed bearings, a brand new CNC metal turbine, brushless motor, and manual winding motor. This new improved F16 compressed air feather uses a brushless high-speed DC motor with a maximum output speed of 160000 rpm, which can generate ultra high speed wind speeds of up to 60 meters per second, equivalent to a level 16 typhoon.

Powerful dust collector: This compressed air dust collector can generate pressure and speed exceeding 60 meters per second. This electric dust collector has four shark gills that can actively dissipate heat through ventilation openings, effectively expelling hot air from the cabin and providing protection for sustainable operation. This wireless dust collector can adjust three speeds (strong wind, hurricane, and super strong wind).

10000mAh battery and 16000rpm speed: This compressed air plume (air dust collector) has strong power, long-lasting stability, and will not burn the machine under long-term load. This portable turbofan also has charging and overheating protection functions, with a single speed battery life of up to 8 hours. It has two 21700 built-in batteries with a capacity of 10000mAh, providing a longer lifespan!

Portable and compact: This dust collector has a small volume, light design, and is easy to carry. The compact turbofan casing makes it easy to carry and use outdoors. The wireless design is stylish and exquisite. The C-type charging interface supports 20W fast charging, with a compact size that is easier to use than single handed charging, ensuring fast and efficient charging.

Multi functional application: This compressed air dust collector meets various cleaning needs. Air cushion blowing, computer equipment cleaning, industrial dust blowing, charcoal burning support for combustion, car snow blowing, film studio shooting and ventilation, pet drying and other purposes.
